remediation_patterns.title: Obsolete ALV Function Modules
remediation_patterns.reason: REUSE* ALV FMs removed in S/4HANA
remediation_patterns.before_code: CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_LIST_DISPLAY' EXPORTING i_callback_program = sy-repid TABLES t_fieldcat = lt_fcat t_outtab = lt_data.
remediation_patterns.after_code: cl_salv_table=>factory( IMPORTING r_salv_table = lo_alv CHANGING t_table = lt_data ). lo_alv->display( ).

remediation_patterns.title: Pooled/Cluster Table Removal
remediation_patterns.before_code: SELECT * FROM vbddata INTO TABLE lt_data.
remediation_patterns.after_code: SELECT * FROM matdoc INTO TABLE lt_data WHERE ...

remediation_patterns.title: Removed Index Tables (BSIS, BSAS)
remediation_patterns.before_code: SELECT * FROM bsis INTO TABLE lt_bsis.
remediation_patterns.after_code: SELECT * FROM I_UniversalJournal INTO TABLE lt_bsis WHERE ...
